technitium-dns.name: Technitium DNS Server
technitium-dns.description: Self-hosted DNS platform with authoritative zones, recursive resolution, DHCP, DNSSEC, filtering, app extensions, and cluster-aware administration.

tvmaze.name: TVmaze
tvmaze.description: Public TV and streaming metadata service for discovery, schedules, episode tracking, cast/crew data, and update feeds.

omdb.name: OMDb
omdb.description: RESTful web service for movie, series, and episode metadata sourced from IMDb. Single-endpoint query-parameter API with API key authentication.

schedulesdirect.name: Schedules Direct
schedulesdirect.description: Nonprofit TV listings and EPG data service providing lineups, schedules, program metadata, images, and celebrity data via JSON API.
